message:
Perf: hex lookup table, WASM pooling, zero-copy tree parsing

- Add src/hex.ts with pre-computed lookup table, replace all
  Array.from().map().join() hex encoding (6 call sites)
- Reuse engine's cached WasmEngine in packfile-builder instead of
  creating a new instance per buildPackfile call
- Replace .slice() with .subarray() for immediate-use byte views
  in tree parsing (checkout, upload-pack, git-porcelain, git-engine)
- Add getHeapUsed() to WasmEngine, log peak heap after unpack
